description_long: A young child is depicted in a seated position with knees bent and feet flat, as if sitting on an invisible surface. The child has short, straight hair and is dressed in a short-sleeve t-shirt and long, loose-fitting pants with a subtle pattern. Sandal-style footwear is worn, exposing the toes and heels. Accessories include a wristband on the left wrist and a necklace, adding detail to the outfit. The child's arms are relaxed, with one hand resting on the knee and the other hanging loosely. The overall appearance suggests a casual, everyday urban setting, such as a park or sidewalk.
description: A seated child with short hair, wearing a t-shirt, patterned pants, sandals, and accessories, posed as if sitting on an invisible surface.
description_view_0: The child is seen from an elevated left angle, highlighting the side of the face, the left arm, and the bent legs with sandals visible.
description_view_1: A frontal view showing the child's face, both arms, and the full front of the outfit, with accessories clearly visible.
description_view_2: A right-side profile view, emphasizing the child's posture, the right arm, and the side of the sandals.
description_view_3: A rear view showing the back of the head, t-shirt, and the child's overall seated posture from behind.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeve t-shirt and long loose-fitting pants with accessories
attribute_hairstyle: short straight hair with a natural side part
attribute_posture: sitting with knees bent and feet flat
